title: Amulet Craft (T1 Spirit + Defenses + Resistances + Max ES)
goal: Fractured +3 projectile amulet with T1 Spirit prefix, global defense, double resistance suffix, and max ES / rarity bonus. Expensive but a top-tier endgame slot.

baseRequirements.base: Any amulet base — ilvl 82 for T1 resistance access
baseRequirements.hint: ilvl 75 is fine for most rolls. ilvl 82 only matters if you want T1 resistance specifically. Bring a budget — this craft is amongst the most expensive listed.

steps.title: Buy or self-fracture +3 projectile base
steps.description: Buy a fractured +3 projectile amulet base off trade. If you want to gamble, you can also self-fracture an existing one — usually cheaper to just buy a clean fracture.

requiredMods.pattern: to level of all projectile.*spells|to level of all projectile.*skill

steps.title: Chaos spam for T1 Spirit
steps.description: Chaos spam the amulet until you hit T1 Spirit (the highest tier spirit prefix). This is expensive — budget 300+ chaos orbs on average to find the roll.
steps.stopLoss: T1 Spirit is the gate of this whole craft. If 500 chaos in without a hit, evaluate if your base is even competitive.

steps.title: Dextral Exalt → Dextral Crystallise + Perfect Essence of Enhancement
steps.description: Use Omen of Dextral Exaltation + Exalted Orb to land a suffix. Then Dextral Crystallisation + Perfect Essence of Enhancement → removes the suffix and adds GLOBAL DEFENSE as a prefix in its place.

steps.title: Dextral Necromancy + Preserved Collarbone + Echoes for resistance unveil
steps.description:
Stack Omen of Dextral Necromancy with Preserved Collarbone. Use Abyssal Echoes for unveil rerolls.

You're looking for any resist on the unveil. 6 looks should nearly always land at least one resistance.

steps.title: Homogenising + Dextral Exalt + Greater Exalt → second resistance suffix
steps.description:
Use Omen of Homogenising Exaltation + Omen of Dextral Exaltation + Greater Exalted Orb. This is a 100% chance to land a resistance suffix.

Alternative: use a Catalysing Exaltation + matching Catalyst to target a specific resistance of your choice (e.g. cold or fire).

steps.title: Omen of Light → annul → repeat step 4 for double-res suffix
steps.description:
Use Omen of Light + annul to selectively remove the previous suffix, then repeat the previous step. End state: 2 resistance suffixes on the amulet.

If your build doesn't need more resistance, do this same step but with Crit Chance instead (Catalysing + Crit catalyst).

steps.title: Preserved Collarbone + Abyssal Echoes → max ES% or Rarity
steps.description:
Apply Preserved Collarbone with Abyssal Echoes. Target mod is maximum Energy Shield % or Magic Find / Rarity.

If you fail to hit it, Omen of Light + annul to remove the failed mod and retry.

pricingTips: +3 Projectile + T1 Spirit alone is enough to bait the right buyers — lead the description with these.
Specific resistances (fire/cold) sell faster than open-tier resistance — call them out in the listing title.
notes: Step 1 (T1 Spirit) is the gate. If you don't hit it, the rest of the craft can't recover the cost.
If your build doesn't care about double resistance, swap one of the suffix slams in step 5 for Crit Chance instead.
